## What type of content is this?

- [ ] Tool / utility
- [ ] Demo
- [ ] Diskmag
- [ ] Public domain game
- [ ] Freeware / homebrew
- [ ] Music / SID related
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Region compatibility

- [ ] NTSC confirmed
- [ ] PAL/NTSC confirmed
- [ ] Unknown
- [ ] PAL only

## SD2IEC compatibility

- [ ] Confirmed working on SD2IEC
- [ ] Likely compatible
- [ ] Unknown
- [ ] Requires true 1541 drive emulation
- [ ] Not SD2IEC compatible

- [ ] D64

- [ ] D81

## Distribution/licensing status

Please explain why this source is okay to include or download from this project.

Examples:

- Public domain
- Freeware
- Open source
- Author-hosted download
- Official project download page
- Permission granted by author
